commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a default-off Telegram botToBot config/policy helper, gates inbound bot-originated Telegram messages before existing authorization, updates channel_post tests, stabilizes one polling-session test, and refreshes config/plugin SDK metadata.

PR surface: Source +223, Tests +230, Generated 0, Other 0. Total +453 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the patch blockers: source inspection of the PR head shows the default-disabled gate before existing authorization, username-only admission, incomplete safety config, and missing real proof. I did not run live Telegram validation in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers combine Telegram product/security config direction, channel_post upgrade behavior, and contributor real-behavior proof rather than a safe automated repair.
